tasks.title: Release signing path
tasks.summary: Integrate the production signing path and keep it reproducible in CI.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify signing path is reproducible in CI and matches the M7 gate
notes: Azure Trusted Signing remains release-only and is tracked here rather than in M0~M6 feature milestones.
commands: [] — release-only task; executed via external CI/CD pipeline, not local build.
outputs list directory paths; specific filenames are determined at implementation time.

notes: commands: [] — release-only task; executed via external CI/CD pipeline, not local build.
outputs list directory paths; specific filenames are determined at implementation time.
